differences.title: 1. Data Fetching
differences.leftDesc: Utilizes `getServerSideProps` or API routes for data fetching.
differences.rightDesc: Built-in data loading within routes, ideal for form mutations.

differences.title: 2. Routing
differences.rightDesc: Nested routing with route modules for parallel data fetching.

differences.title: 3. Data Mutations
differences.leftDesc: Requires separate API routes to handle form submissions.

differences.title: 4. Performance
differences.leftDesc: Focuses on code splitting and optimizations for fast loads.
differences.rightDesc: Prioritizes minimal client-side JavaScript for faster interactions.

differences.title: 5. Error Handling
differences.leftDesc: Uses dedicated error pages for recovery.
differences.rightDesc: Leverages React Error Boundaries for UI resilience.

differences.title: 6. Styling
differences.leftDesc: Supports various styling methods: CSS Modules, Tailwind, etc.
differences.rightDesc: Emphasizes global CSS with importable styles.

differences.title: 7. Focus
differences.leftDesc: Aims for rapid development with pre-built features.
differences.rightDesc: Prioritizes fast user interactions and seamless data flow.
